The '''Battle of Garqi''' took place near the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
===Republic-Separatist clash===
The [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] fought the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the battle, the Republic accidentally bombed a Garqian farmhouse. General [[Traavis]] deployed [[Aiwha Squad]] to search for surviving civilians and to bring them to a refugee camp to be treated.<ref name="Orders" />

Aiwha Squad found a single survivor, a little boy named [[Evan]]. The commandos escorted the boy through hostile-occupied territory, rescuing him from a heavily armed [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|homing spider droid]] and finally getting him to a Republic outpost. Along the way, the boy got to know the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]], and learned of their dedication to always following orders.<ref name="Orders" />

===Order 66===
When the commandos arrived at the Republic post, they reported to General Traavis, who commended them on their actions and told them that he had heard reports of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|death]], which would soon lead to an end in the fighting. Evan said goodbye to the clone commando [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]], just as [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was ordered and the commandos executed the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] in front of the boy. He was told by RC-1013 that the Jedi were traitors and had to be killed, according to their orders.<ref name="Orders" />
